svg.text: CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET — THE KING'S REGRET
• Age: 45–55. Strong jaw, slight beard, deep-set eyes
• Crown: Newar mukut — tiered gold, gemstones
• Coat: Deep crimson with dhaka-pattern trim
• Robes: Burgundy with gold hem border (Newar style)
• Tika: Red vermillion on forehead throughout
• Act 3: Robes worn, damp; no crown (penitent)
• Act 4: Crown returned but simpler; peaceful posture
